title: clerodendrum ekmanii
intro: Clerodendrum ekmanii, also known as the Ekman's glorybower, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits associated with Clerodendrum ekmanii include its potential to alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to soothe skin irritations. Herbal preparations of Clerodendrum ekmanii typically involve the plant's leaves, which can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
